summary: Completed frontend testing for new page structure (iteration 3). All 3 new pages (/recambios, /citas, /nosotros) load correctly. Navigation restructured from anchor links to page routes working properly. Hero carousel with 4 slides functional. Appointment form submits to API and opens WhatsApp. One minor phone number inconsistency found in LocationSection.

issues: Phone number inconsistency: LocationSection shows +34 607 665 474 while Footer, Citas page, and HeroSection show +34 613 430 084

passed_tests: Homepage (/) loads with Hero carousel, Services, Location, Footer - NO Recambios or Citas sections (✓)
Navigation bar shows: Servicios | Recambios | Citas | Nosotros | Ubicación | Reservar Cita button (✓)
/recambios page loads with header, weekly deals grid, parts search section (✓)
/nosotros page loads with hero banner, stats bar, Mission/Vision/Objective cards, Values section (✓)
CTA button 'Reservar Cita' navigates to /citas page (✓)
Footer links point to correct routes (/recambios, /citas, /nosotros) (✓)
WhatsApp floating button appears on all pages (✓)
Hero carousel slides through 4 images with text changes (✓)
Phone number +34 613 430 084 on Citas page and Footer (✓)
WhatsApp redirect opens after form submission (✓)
action_items: Fix phone number in LocationSection.jsx (line 91): Change +34 607 665 474 to +34 613 430 084
critical_code_review_comments: Phone number inconsistency between LocationSection (+34 607 665 474) and other components (+34 613 430 084) - needs correction for consistency

success_rate.backend: N/A (not tested - backend unchanged from iteration 2)
